## Review notes

- Keep this PR focused on one work unit.
- See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for setup, testing, linting, and commit conventions.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change.
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/` passes, or known failures are documented below.
- [ ] `python -m ruff check src/ tests/ --no-fix` passes, or baseline debt is documented below.
- [ ] `python -m ruff format src/ tests/ --check` passes.
- [ ] Changelog updated or not needed.
- [ ] Linked issue included, or no issue is needed for this docs-only/internal change.
